result.summary: Found 3 visual issues on this BetRivers Pennsylvania casino page, primarily related to truncated content and partially clipped UI elements that reduce readability and usability.

issues.description: Game cards in the rightmost column are clipped/cut off across both the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections. Game titles like 'MAGNI PHO...' and 'MUNC MI...' are unreadable due to being cropped at the screen edge.
issues.suggestion: While partial card visibility is a common carousel hint pattern, ensure at least the game title and key info remain legible. Adjust card sizing or peek amount so truncated cards show enough content to be identifiable.

issues.description: The 'Hot Ga...' navigation tab in the top category bar is cut off and the label is unreadable, providing no clear affordance or label for that navigation option.
issues.suggestion: Ensure navigation labels are fully visible or implement a horizontal scroll indicator so users understand there are more tabs available. Consider abbreviating labels more gracefully or using icons with tooltips.

issues.description: The 'i' info icons overlaid on game thumbnails are small and low-contrast against some game artwork backgrounds, making them difficult to notice and tap accurately on mobile.
issues.suggestion: Increase the size of the info icon buttons to at least 44x44px tap targets and ensure sufficient contrast with a semi-transparent background or border around the icon.
